params.focusReason: SOLO field (only maiden) so NO Full Burst and no teammate buffs — the cleanest possible isolation of her 547.62% proc (rider) and RL normals; fixed value bands.

method: ffmpeg frames + contact sheets (portrait 1206x2622, no rotation). Values read against scripts/probe/hit-values.ts.
notes: RIDER-CRIT test — CONFIRMED. Solo/no-FB gives fixed value bands (hit-values): normal 129,665 (core 259,330), proc/rider 547.62% = 463,341. CLEAN RESULT: her proc reads 437296 (white, non-crit) and 655945 (orange + crit icon) = EXACTLY x1.5 (solo → no FB inflating the major, so a crit is a clean x1.5). So her DAMAGE RIDER CRITS — the clean on-footage confirmation LM/liberalio couldn't give (their bands entangle). Her RL NORMAL shows 'CORE HIT' (244753 ≈ sim normal-core 259,330) on essentially every shot → RL core rate ~near-100% (feeds the AUTO_CORE_RATE per-weapon scan, open-questions A15). Rider crit + ginmy's DoT test together settle: DoT/rider damage crits; engine's XCRIT gate is wrong (open-questions U13).
